name: 60"x40" Landscape Framed Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Get your home decorating with the 60"x40" Landscape Framed Canvas from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This stunning piece features a beautiful landscape design, perfect for bringing a touch of nature charm to your home. Made from durable plastic material, the frame adds a sleek and modern look. Ideal for any room, it’s great for creating a relaxing and serene atmosphere. Whether you're decorating your living room or bedroom, this framed canvas is a simple way to enjoy the beauty of the art every day.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
